verses.text: 'Great is the LORD,' praised in His city, beautiful Mount Zion, where God is known as a refuge. The dwelling of God is glorious. Its true beauty is the presence of the great King within it.
'Great is the LORD,' praised in His city, beautiful Mount Zion, where God is known as a refuge. The dwelling of God is glorious. Its true beauty is the presence of the great King within it.
'Great is the LORD,' praised in His city, beautiful Mount Zion, where God is known as a refuge. The dwelling of God is glorious. Its true beauty is the presence of the great King within it.
Kings gathered against the city, but they 'saw it, and... were troubled, and hasted away,' seized with fear. Their assault collapsed. The God who guards His people scatters their proudest foes.
Kings gathered against the city, but they 'saw it, and... were troubled, and hasted away,' seized with fear. Their assault collapsed. The God who guards His people scatters their proudest foes.
Kings gathered against the city, but they 'saw it, and... were troubled, and hasted away,' seized with fear. Their assault collapsed. The God who guards His people scatters their proudest foes.
Kings gathered against the city, but they 'saw it, and... were troubled, and hasted away,' seized with fear. Their assault collapsed. The God who guards His people scatters their proudest foes.
What they had heard of God they now see in His city, and they meditate on His lovingkindness in His temple. Experience confirms report. Worship feeds on the remembered mercies of God.
What they had heard of God they now see in His city, and they meditate on His lovingkindness in His temple. Experience confirms report. Worship feeds on the remembered mercies of God.
As God's name reaches the ends of the earth, so does His praise; let Zion rejoice in His judgments. His fame and His praise run together. The righteous acts of God are cause for His people's joy.
As God's name reaches the ends of the earth, so does His praise; let Zion rejoice in His judgments. His fame and His praise run together. The righteous acts of God are cause for His people's joy.

They are bidden to walk about Zion and count her towers, to tell the next generation, 'this God is our God for ever... our guide even unto death.' Faith is passed on. The God of one generation is the unfailing guide of the next.
